response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the 'Airman ga Taosenai' and 'Melodies of Life' lyrics provided in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized lyrics and translations for both songs; transition scenes were identified as instrumental. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal onsets. Visual triggers were used for instrumental track titles and song introductions. Applied aggressive truncation for the rapid-fire lyrics of the first song.

subtitles.original: あの竜巻何回やっても避けれない
subtitles.english:
I couldn't dodge the tornado,
no matter how many times I try.

subtitles.original: うしろに回って撃ち続けても
subtitles.english: Despite jumping behind and firing repeatedly,

subtitles.original: いずれは風に飛ばされる
タイム連打も試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I even tried rapid time firing,

subtitles.original: 竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い
subtitles.english: but it's meaningless against the tornado.

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, in order to win the next round,

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save the E tank until the very last moment!

subtitles.original: あてもなくさまよっていた
手がかりもなく探し続けた
あなたがくれた思い出を
subtitles.english: The memories you gave to me...
I'll turn them into a song to heal my heart.
